message:
Add standard E2E logging to shell test scripts

Implement sources_sync.sh from scratch using e2e_log.sh (was empty).
Add e2e_log.sh sourcing and standard event emission to cli_flow.sh,
semantic_index.sh, and cass_daemon_e2e.sh while preserving their
existing custom JSONL logging (Option A compatibility layer).

All scripts now emit structured JSONL to test-results/e2e/ in addition
to their custom output locations. Remove sources_sync.sh from .gitignore
since it is no longer a stub.

Closes br-20bz.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -66,5 +66,3 @@ __pycache__/

 perf/

-scripts/e2e/sources_sync.sh

@@ -17,6 +17,10 @@ set -euo pipefail

+source "${PROJECT_ROOT}/scripts/lib/e2e_log.sh"
+e2e_init "shell" "daemon_fallback"

+    e2e_phase_start "build" "Compile cass binary"
     run_step "build" bash -c "cd \"$PROJECT_ROOT\" && CARGO_TARGET_DIR=\"$BUILD_TARGET_DIR\" cargo build"
     emit_phase_end "build"
+    e2e_phase_end "build" 0
 fi
 
 if [[ -z "${CASS_BIN:-}" ]]; then
@@ -276,13 +283,15 @@ fi
 if [[ ! -x "$CASS_BIN" ]]; then
     log "FAIL" "cass binary not found or not executable at ${CASS_BIN}"
     emit_run_end 1
+    e2e_run_end 0 0 0 0 "$(e2e_duration_since_start)"
     exit 1
 fi
 
 run_step "version" "$CASS_BIN" --version
 
 # Phase: Setup sandbox data
 emit_phase_start "setup_sandbox" "Prepare test fixtures"
+e2e_phase_start "setup_sandbox" "Prepare test fixtures"
 log "INFO" "Preparing sandbox data"
 mkdir -p "${CODEX_HOME}/sessions/2024/11/20"
 cat > "${CODEX_HOME}/sessions/2024/11/20/rollout-daemon-e2e.jsonl" <<'JSONL'
@@ -292,6 +301,7 @@ cat > "${CODEX_HOME}/sessions/2024/11/20/rollout-daemon-e2e.jsonl" <<'JSONL'
 {"type":"response_item","timestamp":1732118403000,"payload":{"role":"assistant","content":"Retries should include randomized jitter to avoid thundering herd."}}

 emit_phase_end "setup_sandbox"
+e2e_phase_end "setup_sandbox" 0

 export CODEX_HOME="${CODEX_HOME}"

 # Phase: Indexing
 emit_phase_start "indexing" "Build full-text and semantic indexes"
+e2e_phase_start "indexing" "Build full-text and semantic indexes"
 run_step "index_full" "$CASS_BIN" index --full --data-dir "${DATA_DIR}"
 run_step "index_semantic" "$CASS_BIN" index --semantic --full --embedder "${EMBEDDER}" --data-dir "${DATA_DIR}"

 if [[ $HEALTH_CHECK -eq 1 ]]; then
     emit_phase_start "health_check" "Validate cass status command"
+    e2e_phase_start "health_check" "Validate cass status command"
     emit_test_start "test_status_command"
+    e2e_test_start "test_status_command" "daemon"
     TEST_START_MS=$(now_ms)
 
     STATUS_STDOUT="${STDOUT_DIR}/status.out"
@@ -327,18 +341,23 @@ if [[ $HEALTH_CHECK -eq 1 ]]; then
     if [[ $STATUS_EXIT -eq 0 ]]; then
         log "OK" "status command"
         emit_test_end "test_status_command" "pass" "$TEST_DURATION_MS"
+        e2e_test_pass "test_status_command" "daemon" "$TEST_DURATION_MS"
     else
         log "FAIL" "status command (exit ${STATUS_EXIT})"
         emit_test_end "test_status_command" "fail" "$TEST_DURATION_MS" "status command returned exit code ${STATUS_EXIT}"
+        e2e_test_fail "test_status_command" "daemon" "$TEST_DURATION_MS" 0 "exit code ${STATUS_EXIT}" "CommandFailed"
     fi
     emit_phase_end "health_check"
+    e2e_phase_end "health_check" "$TEST_DURATION_MS"
 fi
 
 # =============================================================================
 # Test: Daemon Fallback (unavailable scenario)
 # =============================================================================
 emit_phase_start "daemon_fallback_test" "Test daemon fallback when unavailable"
+e2e_phase_start "daemon_fallback_test" "Test daemon fallback when unavailable"
 emit_test_start "test_daemon_fallback_unavailable"
+e2e_test_start "test_daemon_fallback_unavailable" "daemon"

 if [[ "${EMBEDDER}" == "hash" ]]; then
@@ -364,9 +383,11 @@ SEARCH_LATENCY_MS=$((SEARCH_END_MS - SEARCH_START_MS))
 if [[ $SEARCH_EXIT -eq 0 ]]; then

     emit_test_end "test_daemon_fallback_unavailable" "pass" "$SEARCH_LATENCY_MS"

     log "FAIL" "search (exit ${SEARCH_EXIT})"
     emit_test_end "test_daemon_fallback_unavailable" "fail" "$SEARCH_LATENCY_MS" "search with daemon flag returned exit code ${SEARCH_EXIT}"
+    e2e_test_fail "test_daemon_fallback_unavailable" "daemon" "$SEARCH_LATENCY_MS" 0 "exit code ${SEARCH_EXIT}" "CommandFailed"
 fi
 
 # Parse fallback metrics from stderr
@@ -422,6 +443,7 @@ emit_metrics "daemon_fallback" \
     "backoff_count=${BACKOFF_COUNT}"
 
 emit_phase_end "daemon_fallback_test"
+e2e_phase_end "daemon_fallback_test" "$SEARCH_LATENCY_MS"
 
 cat > "${REPORT_JSON}" <<EOF
 {
@@ -485,6 +507,8 @@ fi
 
 # Emit run_end event
 emit_run_end "$FINAL_EXIT"
+E2E_TOTAL_DURATION=$(e2e_duration_since_start)
+e2e_run_end "$TESTS_TOTAL" "$TESTS_PASSED" "$TESTS_FAILED" 0 "$E2E_TOTAL_DURATION"
 
 if [[ $FINAL_EXIT -ne 0 ]]; then
     log "FAIL" "Daemon E2E run failed (${TESTS_FAILED}/${TESTS_TOTAL} tests failed)"

@@ -18,6 +18,10 @@ set -euo pipefail
 SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
 PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/../.." && pwd)"
 
+# Source standard E2E logging library (emits to test-results/e2e/)
+source "${PROJECT_ROOT}/scripts/lib/e2e_log.sh"
+e2e_init "shell" "cli_flow"
+

 LOG_ROOT="${PROJECT_ROOT}/target/e2e-cli"
 RUN_DIR="${LOG_ROOT}/run_${RUN_ID}"
@@ -58,6 +62,8 @@ done
 
 mkdir -p "${RUN_DIR}" "${STDOUT_DIR}" "${STDERR_DIR}"
 
+e2e_run_start
+
 # Colors (only when stdout is a terminal)
 if [[ -t 1 ]]; then
     RED='\033[0;31m'
@@ -149,6 +155,7 @@ run_step() {
     local exit_code
 
     start_ms=$(now_ms)
+    e2e_test_start "$name" "cli_flow"
 
     log PHASE "STEP: ${name}"
     log INFO "Command: $*"
@@ -163,8 +170,10 @@ run_step() {
 
     if [[ $exit_code -eq 0 ]]; then
         log INFO "${name}: OK (${duration_ms}ms)"
+        e2e_test_pass "$name" "cli_flow" "$duration_ms"
     else
         log ERROR "${name}: FAIL (${exit_code}) in ${duration_ms}ms"
+        e2e_test_fail "$name" "cli_flow" "$duration_ms" 0 "exit code ${exit_code}" "CommandFailed"
         FAILED_STEPS+=("${name}")
         if [[ $FAIL_FAST -eq 1 ]]; then
             log ERROR "Fail-fast enabled; aborting after ${name}."
@@ -282,6 +291,12 @@ write_summary() {
     end_iso=$(now_iso)
     duration_ms=$((end_ms - START_MS))
 
+    # Emit standard E2E run_end event
+    local _total=${#STEP_JSONS[@]}
+    local _failed=${#FAILED_STEPS[@]}
+    local _passed=$((_total - _failed))
+    e2e_run_end "$_total" "$_passed" "$_failed" 0 "$duration_ms"
+
     if [[ ${#FAILED_STEPS[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
         status="ok"
     else

@@ -18,6 +18,10 @@ set -euo pipefail
 SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
 PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/../.." && pwd)"
 
+# Source standard E2E logging library (emits to test-results/e2e/)
+source "${PROJECT_ROOT}/scripts/lib/e2e_log.sh"
+e2e_init "shell" "semantic_index"
+

 mkdir -p "${RUN_DIR}" "${STDOUT_DIR}" "${STDERR_DIR}" "${SANDBOX_DIR}" "${DATA_DIR}" "${CODEX_HOME}" "${HOME_DIR}"
 
+e2e_run_start
+
 log() {
     local level=$1
     shift
@@ -105,6 +111,12 @@ run_step() {
     local stdout_file="${STDOUT_DIR}/${name}.out"
     local stderr_file="${STDERR_DIR}/${name}.err"
     local exit_code
+    local step_start_ms
+    local step_end_ms

+    step_start_ms=$(date +%s%3N 2>/dev/null || echo $(($(date +%s) * 1000)))
+    e2e_test_start "$name" "semantic_index"

     else

+        e2e_test_fail "$name" "semantic_index" "$step_duration_ms" 0 "exit code ${exit_code}" "CommandFailed"
         FAILED_STEPS+=("${name}")
     fi
 
@@ -149,6 +166,12 @@ run_step_optional() {
     local stdout_file="${STDOUT_DIR}/${name}.out"
     local stderr_file="${STDERR_DIR}/${name}.err"
     local exit_code
+    local step_start_ms
+    local step_end_ms
+    local step_duration_ms
+
+    step_start_ms=$(date +%s%3N 2>/dev/null || echo $(($(date +%s) * 1000)))
+    e2e_test_start "$name" "semantic_index"
 
     log "STEP" "${name}: $*"
 
@@ -157,10 +180,15 @@ run_step_optional() {
     exit_code=$?
     set -e
 
+    step_end_ms=$(date +%s%3N 2>/dev/null || echo $(($(date +%s) * 1000)))
+    step_duration_ms=$((step_end_ms - step_start_ms))
+
     if [[ $exit_code -eq 0 ]]; then
         log "OK" "${name}"
+        e2e_test_pass "$name" "semantic_index" "$step_duration_ms"
     else

     fi

@@ -223,6 +251,14 @@ write_summary() {
         status="fail"
     fi
 
+    # Emit standard E2E run_end event
+    local _total=${#STEP_JSONS[@]}
+    local _failed=${#FAILED_STEPS[@]}
+    local _passed=$((_total - _failed))
+    local _duration
+    _duration=$(e2e_duration_since_start)
+    e2e_run_end "$_total" "$_passed" "$_failed" 0 "$_duration"

@@ -0,0 +1,172 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# scripts/e2e/sources_sync.sh
+# End-to-end test for sources list/doctor commands with structured logging.
+#
+# Usage:
+#   ./scripts/e2e/sources_sync.sh
+#   CASS_BIN=target/debug/cass ./scripts/e2e/sources_sync.sh
+#   ./scripts/e2e/sources_sync.sh --no-build --fail-fast
+#
+# Artifacts:
+#   test-results/e2e/shell_sources_sync_<timestamp>.jsonl
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "${SCRIPT_DIR}/../.." && pwd)"
+
+# Source the E2E logging library
+source "${PROJECT_ROOT}/scripts/lib/e2e_log.sh"
+
+# Initialize logging
+e2e_init "shell" "sources_sync"
+
+# Configuration
+NO_BUILD=0
+FAIL_FAST=0
+
+for arg in "$@"; do
+    case "$arg" in
+        --no-build)
+            NO_BUILD=1
+            ;;
+        --fail-fast)
+            FAIL_FAST=1
+            ;;
+        --help|-h)
+            echo "Usage: $0 [--no-build] [--fail-fast]"
+            exit 0
+            ;;
+    esac
+done
+
+# Sandbox directories
+SANDBOX_DIR="${PROJECT_ROOT}/target/e2e-sources-sync/run_$(e2e_run_id)"
+HOME_DIR="${SANDBOX_DIR}/home"
+DATA_DIR="${SANDBOX_DIR}/data"
+CODEX_HOME="${SANDBOX_DIR}/.codex"
+STDOUT_DIR="${SANDBOX_DIR}/stdout"
+STDERR_DIR="${SANDBOX_DIR}/stderr"
+
+mkdir -p "${HOME_DIR}" "${DATA_DIR}" "${CODEX_HOME}" "${STDOUT_DIR}" "${STDERR_DIR}"
+
+# Test counters
+TOTAL_TESTS=0
+PASSED_TESTS=0
+FAILED_TESTS=0
+
+# Resolve cass binary
+if [[ -n "${CASS_BIN:-}" ]]; then
+    CASS_BIN_RESOLVED="$CASS_BIN"
+else
+    CASS_BIN_RESOLVED="${PROJECT_ROOT}/target/debug/cass"
+fi
+
+cass_env() {
+    env \
+        HOME="${HOME_DIR}" \
+        CODEX_HOME="${CODEX_HOME}" \
+        CASS_DATA_DIR="${DATA_DIR}" \
+        CODING_AGENT_SEARCH_NO_UPDATE_PROMPT=1 \
+        NO_COLOR=1 \
+        CASS_NO_COLOR=1 \
+        "$@"
+}
+
+run_test() {
+    local test_name="$1"
+    shift
+    local stdout_file="${STDOUT_DIR}/${test_name}.out"
+    local stderr_file="${STDERR_DIR}/${test_name}.err"
+
+    TOTAL_TESTS=$((TOTAL_TESTS + 1))
+    e2e_test_start "$test_name" "sources_sync"
+
+    local start_ms
+    start_ms=$(date +%s%3N 2>/dev/null || echo $(($(date +%s) * 1000)))
+
+    local exit_code=0
+    set +e
+    "$@" >"${stdout_file}" 2>"${stderr_file}"
+    exit_code=$?
+    set -e
+
+    local end_ms
+    end_ms=$(date +%s%3N 2>/dev/null || echo $(($(date +%s) * 1000)))
+    local duration=$((end_ms - start_ms))
+
+    if [[ $exit_code -eq 0 ]]; then
+        e2e_test_pass "$test_name" "sources_sync" "$duration"
+        PASSED_TESTS=$((PASSED_TESTS + 1))
+        e2e_info "PASS: ${test_name} (${duration}ms)" "$test_name"
+    else
+        e2e_test_fail "$test_name" "sources_sync" "$duration" 0 "exit code $exit_code" "CommandFailed"
+        FAILED_TESTS=$((FAILED_TESTS + 1))
+        e2e_error "FAIL: ${test_name} (exit $exit_code, ${duration}ms)" "$test_name"
+        if [[ $FAIL_FAST -eq 1 ]]; then
+            local total_duration
+            total_duration=$(e2e_duration_since_start)
+            e2e_run_end "$TOTAL_TESTS" "$PASSED_TESTS" "$FAILED_TESTS" 0 "$total_duration"
+            exit 1
+        fi
+    fi
+}
+
+# =============================================================================
+# Main Flow
+# =============================================================================
+
+e2e_run_start
+
+# Phase: Build
+if [[ $NO_BUILD -eq 0 && ! -x "$CASS_BIN_RESOLVED" ]]; then
+    e2e_phase_start "build" "Compile cass binary"
+    BUILD_START=$(date +%s%3N 2>/dev/null || echo $(($(date +%s) * 1000)))
+    cargo build --bin cass 2>&1
+    BUILD_END=$(date +%s%3N 2>/dev/null || echo $(($(date +%s) * 1000)))
+    e2e_phase_end "build" "$((BUILD_END - BUILD_START))"
+fi
+
+if [[ ! -x "$CASS_BIN_RESOLVED" ]]; then
+    e2e_error "cass binary not found at ${CASS_BIN_RESOLVED}" "setup"
+    total_duration=$(e2e_duration_since_start)
+    e2e_run_end 0 0 0 0 "$total_duration"
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+# Phase: Setup fixtures
+e2e_phase_start "setup_fixtures" "Create Codex session fixture"
+mkdir -p "${CODEX_HOME}/sessions/2024/11/20"
+cat > "${CODEX_HOME}/sessions/2024/11/20/rollout-sources.jsonl" <<'JSONL'
+{"type":"event_msg","timestamp":1732118400000,"payload":{"type":"user_message","message":"test sources sync flow"}}
+{"type":"response_item","timestamp":1732118401000,"payload":{"role":"assistant","content":"sources sync response"}}
+JSONL
+e2e_phase_end "setup_fixtures" 0
+
+# Phase: Index (needed before sources work properly)
+e2e_phase_start "index" "Build initial index"
+run_test "index_full" cass_env "${CASS_BIN_RESOLVED}" index --full --data-dir "${DATA_DIR}"
+e2e_phase_end "index" 0
+
+# Phase: Sources commands
+e2e_phase_start "sources_commands" "Test sources CLI commands"
+
+run_test "sources_list" cass_env "${CASS_BIN_RESOLVED}" sources list --json
+
+run_test "sources_doctor" cass_env "${CASS_BIN_RESOLVED}" sources doctor --json --data-dir "${DATA_DIR}"
+
+e2e_phase_end "sources_commands" 0
+
+# Emit run end
+total_duration=$(e2e_duration_since_start)
+e2e_run_end "$TOTAL_TESTS" "$PASSED_TESTS" "$FAILED_TESTS" 0 "$total_duration"
+
+if [[ $FAILED_TESTS -gt 0 ]]; then
+    echo "FAIL: ${FAILED_TESTS}/${TOTAL_TESTS} tests failed"
+    echo "Logs: $(e2e_output_file)"
+    exit 1
+fi
+
+echo "PASS: All ${TOTAL_TESTS} tests passed"
+echo "Logs: $(e2e_output_file)"
+exit 0
